title: Madra Teene
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Madra Teene''''' was a classic opera that told of a clash between a colonial [[Planet/Legends|world]] and a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] uprising against their controllers. The [[Theatre Danske]] performed the play during a visit of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the ''[[FarStar]]''. An [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]], sent to eliminate members of the ''FarStar''{{'s}} crew, used the play as cover to approach them during a performance.

==Appearances==
*{{DarkStryder|adventure=Death Is Remotely Possible|book=The DarkStryder Campaign|reprint=yes}} {{1st}}
